review_title: Reliable, easy for non-technical users, great analytics
description: We use urllo for a few things: managing client-facing VDR links, shortening URLs for social media, and to manage when we move content. When I first used urllo I was surprised at how robust and affordable it is - I remember thinking "why didn't I already know about this??" I also have really appreciated the learning resources and guides that urllo puts out, they're clear and in-depth so I don't have to wade through forums to find information on best practices.
author: Jenny M.
pros: Configurable and reliable redirect tools, with crystal clear instructions and great analytics. Urllo makes it super straightforward for me to manage many redirects with multiple source hostnames, even without a technical background.
cons: Not a single complaint - if anything I'm disappointed I don't have more use cases for it right now. I'm looking forward to doing a site rebuild because urllo will make the url management a breeze.

review_title: An original service that accomplishes a simple ask but complex job
description: My experience with Urllo has been extremely positive and I've been a customer for 8 years. I've been on the ground floor with them when they were a small shop and they've always proved their value and worth to me and my employers to accomplish the job and get it done on a project plan or on an overnight request.
author: Wesley K.
pros: I've used Urllo as several companies which one of those powering one of the largest streaming services on the planet. Their price point is very appealing and their service accommodates a simple redirect scenario or a complicated one with UTM Parameters and split path redirects with defaults and additional redirects based upon the paths which is very useful for marketing campaigns. Their support is incredible for the platform and they strive to deliver a top tier service and support experience.
cons: There isn't much to not like about Urllo, it accomplishes everything I've needed and more. My only complaint is the API not offering a full suite of endpoints for the current feature set.

description: Working with URLLO has been a great experience. Their customer service is fast, thoughtful, and genuinely helpful. The platform is intuitive and easy to set up.
author: Ben M.
pros: URLLO is a reliable tool backed by people who clearly care about their customers. Would highly recommend URLLO.
cons: We honestly have no cons to share about URLLO. The platform has been reliable, and backed by responsive customer support.

review_title: Good experience, timely customer support and the software does exactly what is expected.
author: Hiep D.
pros: - Timely and thoughtful customer support - Software is stable and does what it is required to do always
cons: - Pricing model is a little bit too expensive for companies with only 1 or 2 redirect URLs. - At first, it's not clear that the SSL i provide is not compatible
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Set it and Forget it (if you want)
author: Robert S.
pros: Easy to setup, deploy, and manage. It's one of those systems that you can configure and forget about. However, if you want to see traffic reports and other data they have that as well.
cons: When first purchasing I thought it was a little expensive (for the SSL redirect). However when I got in and actually saw everything I could do I easily saw the value.

review_title: Great service. Easy to use and good value.
description: I can create redirects that aren't possible with any DNS services I've used before.
author: David H.
pros: The intuitive dashboard makes it easy to add redirects.
cons: Honestly, I can't find fault with it. Our needs are pretty simple so EasyRedir has more than we need.

description: We needed to securely redirect our domain apex to our www subdomain. EasyRedir's team was great to deal with and their automatic SSL certificate provisioning and renewal is awesome! We can set it and forget it!
author: Alyssa J.
pros: Once I set the software up, everything else ran automatically. We outsourced our website redesign, so having EasyRedir really helped us get the new site up and running without issue. The directions on how to set everything up were incredibly easy, and I think anyone with basic computer understanding could do it. Definitely recommend!
cons: Nothing bad to say! Everything was easy, from implementation to management.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Joseph L.
pros: Easy to configure and use. Great support!
cons: Our colleagues all love this product.....

author: Steve K.
pros: From my perspective, EasyRedir is the web service equivalent of a Swiss Army knife. It packages a lot of very useful features in a very reasonably priced package. I've been using EasyRedir for a number of years and it has added features that I think I'm not even yet taking advantage of. It's a really useful service for our work.
cons: I'm completely satisfied. There are probably other service available that could meet my needs but I don't see any point in even considering them. EasyRedir is easy to use (especially for someone like me who only dips into EasyRedir a few times a year) and it meets all my needs.

author: Michael W.
pros: The simplicity of this software along with its wide reach is invaluable to us. Being able to quickly deploy a global redirect for an advertising campaign, legal initiatives, or M&A activities has never been easier.
cons: Know what you really need from this service and it's hard to identify anything that is unfavorable about it.

author: Patrick B.
pros: Being able to redirect a URL is essential for our business, Easyredirect is easy to use and just does what it says on the tin.
cons: Nothing that i can think of at the moment.

author: Terry T.
pros: Ability to mass import redirects; HSTS redirect support!
cons: Needs better reporting on unlinked target URL's or URL's that get very little/no traffic

author: Sanjay B.
pros: Easy to use, fast and easy UI, ample redirections
cons: Every aspect was bult for ease of use. great

author: Manoj P.
pros: It made it easy to redirect some of our links.
cons: We do not have any bad to say about this software.

description: Simple tool for startups in mid-development
author: Angell T.
pros: Makes it easy to redirect a URL. Worked out great to allow me to have a placeholder for my domain while worked on developing it.
cons: None. I had no problem finding what I needed to do and doing it on my DNS settings etc. There is no other service as simple as this for a cheap price.

review_title: Has made our redirect process for site mergers 10x easier
description: Customer support has been very responsive. Lag times on responses are a non-issue, and the staff they have in place to answer support questions almost know too much, and easily communicate it.
author: Robert S.
pros: It's hard to narrow it down to just one thing, but the setup, security, and analytics are all incredible. I can't imagine the amount of work that went into building out this software, but it was time well spent.
cons: Really no qualms (so far) on my side. I'll make sure to update if that changes!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: David O.
pros: The service is very simple, quick to set up and make changes to so far very reliable. That's all I have to say really.
cons: I haven't yet found anything which I think is a con. Some alerting when changes made to redirects would be good, if this was implemented in the form of a Slack integration that would be ideal.

review_title: Easy to use handling for our needs very good.
author: Thomas G.
pros: We need to create shortlinks for our domain. Therefor easy redir is easy to handle - as the name already says. You just have to enter both URLs and here we go. I doesn't work any easier.
cons: To keep the overview of my re-direct is not that easy. You can't filter them by URL oder save search-terms or something.

review_title: Great fix to host lots on domain name on AWS to get a A-Record issue with ELB's
author: Shane B.
pros: Allows us to host multiple domain name on AWS through ELB's. Great solutions and very easy to use. Would recommend to anyone with the same issue.
cons: The product does everything we wanted it to so we really don't have any cons about it. May be the price could be lower.

description: Following a website migration, I needed to setup two secure redirects that had previously been done on-prem. The service I received from EasyRedir was first class, from the point of initial contact all the way through to successful redirects being in place. I was provided very clear instructions of how to setup the redirects and during the waiting period for the certificate to become active, I felt fully supported by their team.
author: Dan K.
pros: I particularly like the visitor information dashboard, this is certainly an added bonus. I also like just how easy it is to setup the redirects, the admin portal is very easy to navigate.
cons: There is nothing I do not like about EasyRedir.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Until I found this service I didn't even know it could be this easy! I've had a few questions and the developer has been quick and very helpful.
author: Marc B.
Emanuel L.
pros: The install was simple and straightforward, but the support was beyond what I expected. I did not expect anyone to reply to my chat messages in the middle of the night!
cons: There wasn't anything I didn't like about the software.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: This tool is easy to use and does the job very well
author: Kristjan T.
pros: It is easy to use the tool. Support for it is great. Pricing is fair. Different payment plans available.
cons: Looking forward for integrated SSL issue (you have to bring your own SSL today) that can be used with re-directs
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
